home.headline: Find the trails. Pick your route. Know what to expect.
home.subheadline: Verter helps you find runnable trails across Finland – conditions, terrain and training purpose in one place.
home.why1Text: Find trails across Finland that suit running.
home.why2Text: Conditions, technicality and surface – pick the right route for your run.
home.why3Text: Easy recovery, base runs, long runs or hills – choose the right one.

manifesto.line3: Winter isn't a reason to stop.
manifesto.footer: Verter is a compass for runners who want to know where to go — and why.

home.podcastTeaserText: Weekly featured runners and creators. Listen to stories about routes and training.

about.title: Three runners. One shared problem.
about.description: Verter started with three middle-aged friends who realized two things.
about.intro1: Verter started with three middle-aged friends who realized two things.
about.intro2: First: trails don't appear by accident. Second: movement needs knowing what to expect.
about.body1: We trained with different goals, but the same frustration kept returning:
about.body2: Where are the runnable routes? Is it runnable in winter? Does this suit a base run or hill repeats?
about.body3: Too often we ended up on the wrong terrain, in the wrong session, or sliding down an icy descent that wasn't part of the plan. So we built what we were missing.
about.body4: What if there was a tool that brings together trails, routes and conditions — without the hassle?
about.bullet1: Verter is not a coaching platform.
about.bullet3: It's a compass for runners who want to find trails, choose the right route, and know what to expect.
about.body5: As you get older, you realize time and recovery matter more. Training shouldn't rely on guesswork. Recovery isn't guaranteed. The wrong session in the wrong terrain costs more than it used to.
about.body6: Verter exists to make training clearer, more intentional, and less random.
about.body7: Verter is a project in motion. We add routes. We collect camps. We improve condition notes. And most importantly: we test it ourselves first.

footer.tagline: Trail running routes in Finland. Find the trails. Pick your route. Know what to expect.

submit.pageDescription: All submissions are reviewed before publishing. Choose what you want to submit.
submit.eventPageDescription: Fill in the event details. We review submissions before publishing.
submit.routePageDescription: Fill in the route details. A GPX file helps others find the trail.
submit.approvalPrinciplesIntro: Submission guidelines that protect you and explain expectations:
submit.principle2: An official link helps speed up approval
submit.principle3: Information may be shortened or edited for clarity
submit.helperRoute: Route: distance, elevation and start coords help others find the trail.
submit.helperEvent: Event: date or recurrence (e.g. weekly), official link.
submit.helperCamp: Camp: duration, season and focus (e.g. winter, technique).
submit.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid URL (e.g. https://...).
submit.successDescription: We review submissions and publish approved entries.

disclaimer.title: Safety & disclaimer
disclaimer.intro: Verter provides route information and event references as a tool for trail runners. Site content is not continuously verified.
disclaimer.routes: Route details are based on user reports, estimates and official sources. Distances, elevation and conditions may change. Assess your own fitness and stay alert on the trail.
disclaimer.events: Event information is based on organizer submissions. Always confirm dates, location and other details with the official organizer before participating.
disclaimer.responsibility: You use routes and event references at your own risk. Verter is not responsible for your performance, injuries or damages.
